description_long: This is a stylized AK-pattern rifle featuring a striking cherry blossom motif across its body, stock, and magazine. The rifle has a fixed stock and a curved detachable box magazine, both adorned with pink and white floral patterns. The receiver and handguard are similarly decorated, while the barrel and front sight assembly remain matte black, providing a sharp contrast to the decorative elements. The rifle is equipped with standard iron sights and a standard-length barrel, with a simple muzzle device at the tip. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, giving the weapon a polished, almost ornamental appearance. This rifle would stand out in any urban environment due to its unique coloration and decorative theme.
description: A cherry blossom-themed AK-style rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and black iron sights. The body is covered in pink and white floral patterns with a glossy finish.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the floral pattern on the stock and handguard.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the full cherry blossom design, the curved magazine, and the black barrel and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the end of the stock, which is predominantly pink, and the slim profile of the rifle.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showcasing the floral pattern, fixed stock, and the magazine's curvature.
